title: The Cradle Snatchers
writer: Sarah Y. Mason, Norma Mitchell, Russell G. Medcraft
actors: Louise Fazenda, Ethel Wales, J. Farrell MacDonald
plot: From a 1925 hit stage play by Russell G. Medcraft and Norma Mitchell about three unhappy middle-aged homemakers who teach their adulterous husbands a lesson by starting affairs with college-aged young men during the Jazz Age.
